title: Golden Globes 2026 Predictions: Who Will Win, Who Should Win
text: Golden Globes 2026 Predictions Summary. Film Categories: Best Drama Picture: Analyst predicts Sinners will win. Best Musical/Comedy Picture: One Battle After Another is the frontrunner, described as a technical achievement. Acting Predictions: Male Musical/Comedy Actor: Timothée Chalamet predicted to win over Leonardo DiCaprio. Female Musical/Comedy Actor: Emma Stone expected to win. Director: Paul Thomas Anderson (One Battle After Another) is considered a no-brainer winner. Television Categories: Drama Series: The Pitt favored. Comedy Series: The Studio appears unstoppable, building on its historic 13 Emmy wins. Limited Series: Adolescence predicted to win, having cleaned up at the Emmys. Acting: Multiple frontrunners across categories, with The Studio and Severance dominating nominations.
